canonical_definition: Chinese Offensive Language Dataset, a benchmark dataset that categorizes sentences into fine-grained types such as personal attacks and anti-bias expressions concerning race, gender, and region.
papers: MiLQ: BenchmarkingIRModels for Bilingual Web Search with Mixed Language Queries
Unconditional Truthfulness: Learning Unconditional Uncertainty of Large Language Models

relationships.paper: Unconditional Truthfulness: Learning Unconditional Uncertainty of Large Language Models
relationships.evidence: Recent datasets such as ToxiCN (Lu et al., 2023), COLD (Deng et al., 2022), Cdial-bias (Zhou et al., 2022), SWSR (Jiang et al., 2022), and SCCD (Yang et al., 2025b) support toxicity classification but do not provide sentiment-preserving rewrites. (Section 1)
